title: Section 26
content: The constitution, powers 1[and functions of the Finance Committee and of the Faculties] and of such other authorities as may be declared by the Statutes to be authorities of the University, shall be prescribed by the Statutes.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 62 of 1981, s. 13, for certain words (w.e.f, 10-2-1982).
